Or my personal phone motto, “Have a goodbye!”

item.title: Raccoons trying to open a door
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: A Bullet Shot In The Air Struck My Uber Driver’s Car. Full article(2013)below about this child being hit below.
item.description: I post this every time I hear about a bullet coming down. I was about 60 or 70 feet away from this boy when he was struck. DO NOT SHOOT YOUR GOD DAMN GUNS IN THE AIR! https://www.12onyourside.com/story/22790363/chesterfield-police-identify-type-of-bullet-that-killed-7-year-old/?outputType=amp
item.dc:creator: YouThinkImEspeciallyNotAGenius

item.title: Life
item.description: This picture of Dolly Parton and Willie Nelson sharing a joint while being driven through Dollywood in a custom golf cart is life? and sharing it with you is how I?m choosing to start a brand new week on this dumpster fire of a planet. Sending you all Willie and Dolly vibes for a blessed week ?? (originally posted by @MediocrityDave on 2023-01-02 21:37:46)

item.title: It's a start...
item.description: Used to be the only way I'd get to sleep. Still had some wine but that was mostly to try and trick my brain into the trigger of "There's alcohol in the blood, bed time." To anyone else attempting to pull yourself out of the bottle, let's do this day by day. Celebrate small steps because they are just as important as the big ones.
item.dc:creator: RandyRandalman

item.title: Hard to remember sometimes but important to not forget.
item.dc:creator: LightningStrikeSeven
